rationale: Default Playwright harness now boots ddx server from a copied temp fixture; fixtures contain open/closed/blocked beads and tiny library, no $HOME/~ refs, and demo config/spec untouched.

findings.summary: BASE_URL is https://127.0.0.1; relies on the embedded server's TLS plus ignoreHTTPSErrors. Verify the server actually serves TLS on this port when --tsnet=false; otherwise health probe would fail.
Fixture beads use a self-referential dependency (fx-003 depends_on fx-001 but issue_id is fx-003 — looks fine, just noting the schema usage).
